core_mechanism: a driven-dissipative dynamics whose commuting local update (addition) operators generate a finite abelian group acting on the configuration space, so the unique attracting steady state and its scaling exponents are fixed algebraically by that group structure
brief_reason: The abstract states that the particle-addition operators generate an abelian group identical to the Abelian Sandpile group on the graph, and uses this commuting-operator/group equivalence to determine the critical steady state and critical exponents exactly.
